# Support

Before opening a support request, check the existing documentation.

---

## Documentation

- **[README](../README.md)** — Project overview, environment variables, and quick start.
- **[Wiki Home](../Wiki/Home.md)** — Architecture, security model, deployment, and use cases.
- **[API reference](../docs/html/index.html)** — Generated Go API reference. Build locally with `make docs-gen`.

---

## Community support

- **GitHub Discussions** — Questions, configuration help, and implementation discussions.
- **GitHub Issues** — Bug reports only. Use the issue templates provided. Search existing issues before opening a new one.

---

## Commercial support

For organizations running Vyst Open Auth in production and requiring SLA-backed assistance, custom deployment support, or priority issue resolution, contact **pedro@depaula.tech**.

---

## Security issues

Do not open public GitHub issues for security vulnerabilities. See [SECURITY.md](SECURITY.md) for the responsible disclosure process.
